chapter_title: Toll Underpass or Tunnel in Certain Counties
text: The commissioners court may contract with the franchisee to finance, construct, own, maintain, and operate a toll underpass or tunnel and any approach.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 282. Toll Underpass or Tunnel in Certain Counties
##### § 282.004 — Contract Authorized

The commissioners court may contract with the franchisee to finance, construct, own, maintain, and operate a toll underpass or tunnel and any approach.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The commissioners court may contract with the franchisee to finance, construct, own, maintain, and operate a toll underpass or tunnel and any approach.
